title: This NEW NotebookLM Update Changes Everything
summary: Google's NotebookLM has been upgraded to function as a full AI agent capable of writing code, building sources, and delivering finished outputs autonomously. New features include a cloud computer for handling code and documents, auto-source building from initial ideas, and a Studio for generating podcasts and reports with cited answers.
writeup: The video covers a NotebookLM update that extends the tool from a research assistant into an AI agent capable of writing code, building sources, and producing finished outputs without step-by-step direction. Key additions include a cloud computer for running code and handling documents, automatic source building from an initial idea, and a Studio that generates podcasts and reports backed by cited answers. The shift matters because it moves NotebookLM toward autonomous task completion rather than manual querying.
